title: microchilus glacensis
intro: Microchilus glacensis, also known as Himalayan orchid, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae and is native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, Microchilus glacensis is often used to prepare herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
